display_name: Top open-source reasoning LLM rivaling OpenAI's o1 model; delivers top-tier performance across math, code, and reasoning tasks at a fraction of the cost. All data you provide this bot will not be used
description:
Top open-source reasoning LLM rivaling OpenAI's o1 model; delivers top-tier performance across math, code, and reasoning tasks at a fraction of the cost. All data you provide this bot will not be used in training, and is sent only to DeepInfra, a US-based company. Bot does not accept attachment.

Supports 64k tokens of input context and 8k tokens of output context. Quantization: FP8 (official).
